message:
🌱 Add minio: Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize mission (#1288)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "minio-9726-server-startup-failed-with-unable-to-initialize-sub-systems-unable-to",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "minio: Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize sub-systems: Unable to migrate all config at .minio.sys/config/",
+    "description": "Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize sub-systems: Unable to migrate all config at .minio.sys/config/. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your minio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review minio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant minio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio
kubectl get configmap -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio
```
Can't start minio container with volumes 

## Expected Behavior
Run minio container with mounted directory

docker-compose.yml consist with:

```
version: "3"
services:

  minio:
    image: minio/minio
    container_name: minio
    hostname: minio
 "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize…",
+        "description": "Add workaround for issue preventing servers from starting on Windows Docker Engine 19.03.8
```yaml
version: "3"
services:

  minio:
    image: minio/minio
    container_name: minio
    hostname: minio
    volumes:
      - ./minio/s3:/data
    ports:
      - 9000:9000
    command: 'server /data'
    environment:
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minio
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: minio123
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n minio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add workaround for issue preventing servers from starting on Windows Docker Engine 19.03.8",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "version: "3"
services:

  minio:
    image: minio/minio
    container_name: minio
    hostname: minio
    volumes:
      - ./minio/s3:/data
    ports:
      - 9000:9000
    command: 'server /data'
    environment:
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minio
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: minio123",
+        "Creating minio ... done
Attaching to minio
minio    | Attempting encryption of all config, IAM users and policies on MinIO backend
minio    | 
minio    | API: SYSTEM()
minio    | Time: 16:41:52 UTC 05/28/2020
minio    | DeploymentID: fe4965f4-6869-4143-93a3-8a6212da10b1
minio    | Error: Unexpected error, please report this issue at https://github.com/minio/minio/issues
minio    |        8: github.com/minio/minio@/cmd/fs-v1-helpers.go:337:cmd.fsCreateFile()
minio    |        7: github.com/minio/minio@/cmd/fs-v1.go:996:cmd.(*FSObjects).putObject()
minio    |        6: github.com/minio/minio@/cmd/fs-v1.go:910:cmd.(*FSObjects).PutObject()
minio    |        5: github.com/minio/minio@/cmd/config-common.go:66:cmd.saveConfig()
minio    |        4: github.com/minio/minio@/cmd/config-encrypted.go:2",
+        "SET GOOS=linux
SET GOARCH=amd64
go build .

docker build -t minio -f Dockerfile.dev .
docker run -p 9000:9000 --name minio1 -e "MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=minio" -e "MINIO_SECRET_KEY=minio123" -v d:\data\docker:/data --rm -it minio server /data"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
